justification: The question asks for a forecast regarding the future stock price movements of a specific publicly traded company (CenterPoint Energy) on a financial exchange.
question:
Will CNP's market close price on 2026-03-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
